mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS id, p.created_date AS createdDate, p.updated_date AS updatedDate, p.approve_buy_number AS approveBuyNumber, p.brand_number AS brandNumber, p.buyed_number AS buyedNumber, p.contract_id AS contractId, p.ctr_product_id AS ctrProductId, p.deal_price AS dealPrice, p.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, p.factory_id AS factoryId, p.factory_name AS factoryName, p.presell_number AS presellNumber, p.product_cd AS productCd, p.product_name AS productName, p.remark AS remark, p.stock_id AS stockId, p.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, p.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, d.wrap_specs AS wrapSpecs, d.warehouse_pos As warehousePos, d.warehouse_price AS warehusePrice, IFNULL(c.quality_standard, 'Y') AS qualityStandard, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName FROM t_stock_detail_presell p LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON p.contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product d ON p.ctr_product_id = d.id WHERE p.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.apply_cancel_flg = false AND p.buyed_number < p.presell_number AND p.presell_number > (p.buyed_number + p.approve_buy_number) AND c.contract_status != 'B' AND c.contract_status != 'C'
AND p.product_cd = #{productCd}
AND p.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{brandNumber},'%')
AND p.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{factoryName},'%')
AND p.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{warehouseName},'%')
ORDER BY p.id DESC
